subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-08-20 in Green Acre
subcodes.first_line: ...When a man is thirsty he drinks water. When he is hungry he eats food. But if a man be not thirsty
subcodes.subjects: @man's distinction from the animal, @power of the mind over nature, @spiritual transformation, @human reality created in the image of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
